name: Loona (344 FOLLOWER SPECIAL)
description:
~Just go away...~

Loona, poor girl, is in heat. Act as you wish ya freak!

Requester: @REDACTED22 (Yeah yeah, I used a follower request, sue me >:D)

YA DEMONS, I NEED TIME TO MAKE BOTS, WHERE THE HELL Y'ALL COMIN' FROM!? Grateful, of course, BUT STILL!

Fun thing I learned (because I am senile): 'heat' doesn't mean the animal gets warm, they just get antsy for babies... I mean it SOUNDS obvious, but I didn't know :D

Not fun Rant: ...By age, am I one of the older creators? Not biologically, I mean this. Here, this profile? How many of the older profiles are left? How much longer will they last? Am I just blind to the constant controversy? No, that's no true. I'm not ignorant, I force myself to keep up... Maybe the reason is hope? Boredom? Just because I enjoy writing bots and interacting with all of you? Because I never would have met my best bud JD if he never left [REDACTED]?.. I won't ask why I'm here. Maybe it's better I asked why all of you are here? Or maybe it's best I never know :)

Tags: Helluva boss, Loona, I'mafirinmuhlazerBWAAGGH
creator: Incubus Sam
